title: Red Burgundy Balloons Arch Kit, 110 pcs Wine Red Balloons Arch Different Sizes, 18 Inch 12 Inch 10 Inch 5 Inch Maroon Balloons Garland for Birthday Party Decorations Wedding Baby Shower Anniversary
features: 【Burgundy Balloons Different Sizes】110pcs red burgundyballoons arch kit package includes 18 inch balloons (3 pcs), 12 inch balloons (20 pcs), 10 inch balloons (30 pcs), 5 inch balloons (50 pcs), 5 pieces of glue，1 piece Glue chain，1 piece ribbon.

【Non-Toxic & High Quality】The balloon is made of natural latex, which is non-toxic, durable and not easy to break. It can be filled with air and helium and can be reused. Balloon arches are vacuum packed. The color of the balloon will be darker when it is not inflated.

【Perfect Party Decorations】You can hang or stick these metallic silver balloons on doors, walls, ceilings, doorways and other places you want to decorate, Be it a birthday, wedding anniversary, baby showers, Valentine's Day, corporate event, graduation party. These wine red balloons are just perfect for all your party decoration needs.

【Easy to assemble】 We provide 3 tools including balloon chain, glue dispensing, and ribbon tools to help you assemble the balloon arch kit. Simply inflate the balloons and attach to the balloon straps, in a variety of recommended colors and inflate to different sizes to give your wreath a stunning look. And use double-sided dispensing glue to stick the small balloons to the larger balloons, and you'll get the perfect party background decoration.

【Warm Tips】Please be careful to avoid sunburn, overheating, sharp objects and over-inflated balloons. Due to light and screen differences, the color of the balloons may be slightly different from the picture. Due to the thermal expansion and contraction characteristics of aluminum foil balloons, please avoid filling them with too much air or helium.

Click to play video Play Mute Current Time  0:00 / Duration  0:10 Loaded : 60.06% 0:00 Stream Type  LIVE Seek to live, currently behind live LIVE Remaining Time  - 0:10   1x Playback Rate Chapters Chapters Descriptions descriptions off , selected Captions Captions off , selected English (Automated) Audio Track default , selected Fullscreen This is a modal window. balloon Merchant video Uninflated balloon appears darker; matches photo color when inflated For what occasions can balloons be used as decoration? Balloons are widely used in various celebration occasions, such as birthday parties, weddings, holiday celebrations, baby showers, etc. They can be matched with different colors to create a cheerful and festive atmosphere. How to prevent a balloon from deflating? Once inflated, use a balloon knotter or simply tie a tight knot to seal it and avoid letting the gas escape. Sharp objects and excessive temperatures should be avoided, otherwise they may cause damage to the balloon or accelerate gas leakage. What are balloons made of? Made from natural latex. Will the product have color differences? The actual color of the product will be slightly different under different light sources. Color perception is affected by many factors, including screen brightness, contrast settings, ambient light, etc. Is there a color difference between the balloon before it is inflated and after it is inflated? When the balloon is not inflated, it will appear darker and more colorful than after it is inflated. After the balloon is inflated, it will be no different from the product picture.
